title: stelis limbata
intro: Stelis limbata, also known as the "Tiger orchid," is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its vibrant colors and unique shape. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Stelis limbata is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
